name: cursor-anthropic-rate
description: Shows ai-dev-exp anthropic-rate-brief on the status bar (BYOK / API key).

aiDevExp.anthropicRateCliPath.description: Executable that provides subcommand anthropic-rate-brief (on PATH or absolute).

aiDevExp.anthropicRateIntervalMinutes.description: How often to refresh the status bar (each refresh uses one small API call).
